message:
Running command: # ABC + OpenROAD both running. Check what OpenROAD is doing (pre-PnR STA?)
pgrep -f "openroad" | while read pid; do
  CMD=$(cat /proc/$pid/cmdline 2>/dev/null | tr '\0' ' ' | head -c 200)
  echo "PID $pid: $CMD"
done | head -10
echo ""
# Check if STA step dir exists
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -lht "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -10
